positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a crescent moon embracing a cluster of constellations. The aesthetic is retro-futuristic and celestial, rendered in a thick, graphic line art style with solid color blocks and vibrant neon accents on a deep indigo midnight blue background. The composition is perfectly centralized, featuring a bold, clean silhouette of the moon and stars against a cosmic, ink-wash gradient. Use high contrast, clean vector geometry, and a limited palette of deep navy, ethereal cyan, gold leaf, and pure white. Ideal for screen printing on apparel. Concept art, clean lines, Zentangle style elements, symmetrical.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, lowres, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, messy, detailed faces, gradient gradient gradient gradient, photorealism
